task: Extend the Trajectory Export Product Alignment TODO section with detailed implementation steps and pass criteria.
step: extend trajectory export product alignment TODO
summary: Expanded TODO.md Trajectory Export Product Alignment into an implementation plan covering runtime schema validation, explicit row capture, export module, CLI surface, curation packaging, legacy note/skill isolation, and focused tests.
observations: TODO.md now specifies concrete target modules such as src/core/trajectorySchema.ts and src/core/trajectoryExport.ts.
Pass criteria define schema validation, sellable export gating, deterministic JSONL output, duplicate id handling, CLI behavior, and fixture-based tests.
The plan explicitly prevents heuristic row reconstruction from summary/observation/transcript prose; export should collect explicit payload.trajectoryRow candidates.
The plan keeps detailed consent, license, provenance, and audit evidence outside required training rows and treats skill/note references as optional curation metadata.
